data_description.name: Name of the new calendar entity.
data_description.source_entity: The calendar whose events will be transformed.
data_description.pattern: Python regex applied to each event's description (with re.MULTILINE). Must contain at least one capture group. If the pattern does not match, the original summary is kept.
data_description.replacement: Template used to build the new summary, with backreferences like \1, \2 referring to the regex's capture groups. Leave empty to use the first capture group.

error.invalid_regex: The regex pattern is not valid.
error.no_capture_group: The pattern must contain at least one capture group, e.g. (.+).
error.invalid_backreference: The replacement references a capture group that does not exist in the pattern.
